sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73891" key="o(moflegh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-φλεγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n73891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burning together</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at once,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θάλασσα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:220" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.220</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
